title_cn: 安永支付超过 1 亿英镑以解决 NMC Health 法律索赔
summary: EY UK has paid more than £100 million ($133 million) to the administrators of NMC Health Plc to settle claims it was negligent in its audits of the failed firm, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Oil Extends Gains as Trump Says Clock Is Ticking for Iran Deal
title_cn: 特朗普表示伊朗协议的时间已到，油价扩大涨幅
summary: Oil rose for a third day as the US and Iran remained far apart on a deal to end weeks of war and reopen the crucial Strait of Hormuz.

title: Gold Holds Decline as Hormuz Quagmire Keeps Inflation Fear High
title_cn: 霍尔木兹泥沼令通胀担忧高涨，黄金持续下跌
summary: Gold held a decline as a lack of progress in reopening the Strait of Hormuz continued to fan inflation concerns that sent bond markets tumbling.

title: Oil Climbs as Iran War Shows No Sign of Ending: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 伊朗战争没有结束迹象，油价攀升：市场总结
summary: Oil extended gains from last week as the US and Iran remained deadlocked over a deal to end weeks of conflict and restore shipping through the crucial Strait of Hormuz.

title: German Finance Chief Urges Supply-Chain Resilience Ahead of G-7
title_cn: 德国财政部长敦促七国集团峰会前增强供应链弹性
summary: German Finance Minister Lars Klingbeil urged partners to deepen cooperation on raw materials, energy and supply chains to reduce vulnerability in face of challenges such as the Iran war.

title: One Hedge Fund Holds the Keys to Ukraine’s Wartime Industries
title_cn: 一只对冲基金掌握着乌克兰战时工业的钥匙
summary: VR Capital has built a powerful position in Ukrainian bonds, giving it enormous influence as companies key to the war effort try to restructure their debt.

title: Stock Open Clouded by Inflation Alarm From Bonds: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 股市开盘因债券通胀警报而蒙上阴影：市场总结
summary: With no clear-cut end in sight to the Iran war, investors enter a new week under the spell of its key economic consequence: rising global interest rates, and the inflation threat they signal.

title: NextEra Said to Discuss Paying About $76 Per Share for Dominion
title_cn: NextEra 表示将讨论以每股约 76 美元的价格收购 Dominion
summary: NextEra Energy Inc. is discussing a mostly stock deal for Dominion Energy Inc. that would value the company at about $76 per share, or around $66 billion, making it by far the largest power deal on record, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Hundreds Swarm Swatch Stores for "Royal Pop" Release
title_cn: 数百家 Swarm 样本店发布“Royal Pop”
summary: After queuing for days to get their hands on the new Audemars Piguet-Swatch collaboration, fans on Saturday finally got their chance, but heaving crowds stopped some stores from opening their doors and prompted pleas for calm. Bloomberg's Chris Rovzar explains.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg This Weekend 5/17/2026
title_cn: 彭博社本周末 2026 年 5 月 17 日
summary: The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend’s biggest headlines, LIVE from New York. Joined by Luke Broadwater, New York Times White House Correspondent, Mike Lawler, Republican Representative of New York, Soumaya Keynes, Author of "How to Win a Trade War," Missy Ryan, The Atlantic National Security Writer, Theo Baker, Author of "How to Rule the World," Yvette Clarke, Democratic Representative of New York, Leslie Shedd, Former Republican Congressional Advisor, and Ameshia Cross, Democratic Strategist. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gundlach Says It’s ‘Just Not Possible’ for the Fed to Cut Rates
title_cn: 冈拉克表示美联储降息“根本不可能”
summary: Investors won’t see a rate cut out of the next Federal Reserve policy meeting, according to DoubleLine Capital LP chief executive officer Jeffrey Gundlach.

title: School Buses, Tipping, Dog Companions | BTW: Headlines You Should See
title_cn: 校车、小费、狗伙伴 |顺便说一句：你应该看到的头条新闻
summary: Catch up on all the headlines with BTW. Lisa Mateo, Christina Ruffini, David Gura and special guest Brutus the dog, dive into the headlines you may have missed on Bloomberg This Weekend. Watch the show LIVE every Saturday and Sunday morning. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rep. Clarke on Impact of Supreme Court's Redistricting Decision
title_cn: 克拉克众议员谈最高法院重新划分选区决定的影响
summary: Rep. Yvette Clarke, Chair of the Congressional Black Caucus, joined Christina Ruffini and David Gura this morning on Bloomberg This Weekend fro a wide-ranging conversation following a Supreme Court ruling that struck down Louisiana's second majority-Black congressional district. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NVIDIA Earnings Anticipated Amid Supply Constraints and China Uncertainty
title_cn: NVIDIA 盈利预期受供应限制和中国市场的不确定性影响
summary: US President Donald Trump said he discussed guardrails on artificial intelligence with Chinese leader Xi Jinping, while adding that Nvidia Corp.’s H200 chips also came up during a two-day summit in Beijing. Meanwhile, investors will eagerly be awaiting earnings results from chip giant Nvidia, the world’s largest company by market capitalization, for signs of how much momentum the artificial intelligence rally has left in it after a bout of jitters. Bloomberg Tech co-host Ed Ludlow joined Christina Ruffini and David Gura this morning on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: New Book Details Silicon Valley's Grip on College Campuses
title_cn: 新书详细介绍了硅谷对大学校园的控制
summary: Author Theo Baker joined Christina Ruffini and David Gura this morning on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss his new book "How to Rule the World: An Education in Power at Stanford University," chronicling the prize-winning reporting he did for Stanford Univeristy's student newspaper -- reporting that led to the resignation of the university's president. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Can New York City Tax the Rich Without Driving Them Away?
title_cn: 纽约市可以对富人征税而不赶走他们吗？
summary: New York City’s effort to close a multibillion-dollar budget gap has triggered a high-profile clash between Mayor Zohran Mamdani and Wall Street leaders, including Citadel founder Ken Griffin. Mamdani’s proposed “pied-à-terre” tax on luxury second homes has become a flashpoint in a broader debate over whether the city should raise more revenue from wealthy residents or focus on restraining spending growth. Wall Street veteran Whitney Tilson, Partnership for New York City CEO Steve Fulop, and real estate executive Ruth Colp-Haber all warn that messaging matters when competing for businesses and high earners, even as supporters argue the existing property tax system places much of the burden on middle-class property owners and commercial real estate owners. The dispute highlights a larger challenge facing New York: balancing its books while remaining attractive to workers, investors, and employers. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tech Bubble Fear Lures Investors to Hedge With Exotic Options
title_cn: 科技泡沫恐惧吸引投资者利用奇异期权进行对冲
summary: The tech-fueled stock rally is looking bubble-like to some investors, and they’re turning to exotic options that better protect against an eventual slump.

title: National Gas Prices Near Record High
title_cn: 国家天然气价格接近历史新高
summary: For decades — coincidentally, at least since the Iranian Revolution and hostage crisis of 1979-80 — the price at the pump has been a crucial lens through which Americans judge a president’s success or failure. In this conflict, the impact on gasoline prices matters more to individual Americans than the broader military campaign, the removal of Iran’s enriched uranium, or sending in ground troops. Bloomberg News Senior US Oil Reporter Kevin Crowley tells Christina Ruffini and David Gura this morning on Bloomberg This Weekend, it’s not going well. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Ethics Filings Reveal Unusually High Tech Stock Trades
title_cn: 特朗普的道德档案揭示了异常的高科技股票交易
summary: President Donald Trump’s latest financial disclosures show that he or his investment advisers made more than 3,700 trades in the first quarter, a flurry totaling tens of millions of dollars and involving major companies that have dealings with his administration. Bloomberg News Senior Equities Reporter Jess Menton joined joined Christina Ruffini and David Gura this morning on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bond Traders See Tipping Point Toward New Era of Higher Yields
title_cn: 债券交易员看到了迈向更高收益率新时代的转折点
summary: A new era of elevated borrowing costs is potentially underway as war-driven inflation angst intensifies in the US bond market, sending 30-year yields toward a two-decade high above 5%.

title: Trading While the Global Economy Shifts
title_cn: 全球经济转变时的交易
summary: Financial Times columnist and coauthor of the new book "How to Win a Trade War" Soumaya Keynes joined Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the evolving nature of global trade conflicts. Keynes suggests to hosts David Gura and Christina Ruffini that rather than trying to "win" a trade war, the goal should be to minimize economic damage. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Millennial Men Are Rethinking 'Aging Well'
title_cn: 千禧一代男性正在重新思考“健康老龄化”
summary: Bloomberg Pursuits editor of Global Luxury coverage Chris Rovzar joined Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo on Bloomberg This Weekend to explain the concept of "Hotspan", the idea of maintaining fitness, functionality, and good looks, well into older age. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Volatile Chipmaker Stocks Emerge as Key Driver of S&P 500 Rally
title_cn: 波动较大的芯片制造商股票成为标准普尔 500 指数上涨的主要推动力
summary: Shares of chipmakers are increasingly dominating the S&P 500 Index, powering stocks to record highs while stirring concerns over the rally’s durability.

title: Global Inventory Race Intensifies in Shadow of the Iran War
title_cn: 伊朗战争阴影下全球库存竞赛加剧
summary: The global rush to stockpile manufactured goods on fears of an energy-supply crunch will again overshadow business surveys in the coming week gauging the impact of a third month of war in the Middle East.

title: Rep. Lawler: I Support Continuing to Arm Taiwan
title_cn: 众议员劳勒：我支持继续武装台湾
summary: Rep. Mike Lawler (R-NY) joined Christina Ruffini and David Gura this morning on Bloomberg This Weekend for a wide-ranging discussion, including President Trump's impending decision to approve a $14 billion US arms sale to Taiwan, which could unleash a bipartisan backlash in Washington or face Beijing's wrath if the deal is approved. Xi Jinping warned that Taiwan could lead to "clashes" between the US and China, calling it a "highly dangerous situation" for the world's biggest economies. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Return of 1980s Fashion
title_cn: 20 世纪 80 年代时尚回归
summary: Big shoulders, polka dots and peplums are replacing quiet luxury, explains Bloomberg Opinion columnist Andrea Felsted. The 1980s are making a dramatic return to fashion. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Emerging Carry Trade Rebounds With Real, Rand Among Favorites
title_cn: 新兴套利交易反弹，雷亚尔、兰特最受欢迎
summary: The emerging-market carry trade has bounced back from its Iran war losses as surging crude oil prices reinforce expectations that interest rates will stay elevated and bolster the currencies of commodity exporters.

title: Vietnam-Bound Supertanker Halted by US Navy Resumes Journey
title_cn: 美国海军暂停开往越南的超级油轮恢复航行
summary: A Vietnam-bound supertanker carrying 2 million barrels of Iraqi crude, which was halted by US forces days ago after crossing the Strait of Hormuz, has resumed its journey.

title: Australia Says Tax Changes Aim to Fix Broken Housing Market
title_cn: 澳大利亚称税收改革旨在修复破碎的房地产市场
summary: Australia’s Treasurer Jim Chalmers on Sunday reiterated that overhauling the nation’s capital gains tax laws is aimed at fixing a broken housing market.

title: China Market Watchdog Sets Priorities to Support Private Sector
title_cn: 中国市场监管机构优先支持私营部门
summary: China’s market regulator set out 34 priorities for 2026 to support private sector growth, focusing on fair competition, stronger legal protections and efficient regulation.

title: Malaysia, Norway Tensions Deepen Over Scrapped Missile Deal
title_cn: 马来西亚和挪威因废弃导弹交易而紧张局势加剧
summary: Tensions between Malaysia and Norway heightened over a scrapped weapons deal as Oslo confirmed it had revoked export licenses tied to a naval strike missile system.

title: YouTube and Netflix Are Starting to Sound a Lot Like Normal TV
title_cn: YouTube 和 Netflix 开始听起来很像普通电视
summary: YouTube is pitching advertisers on a new slate of shows -- just like a TV network.

title: South Korean Bond Yields Set to Rise on Chips Boom, Analysts Say
title_cn: 分析师表示，韩国债券收益率将因芯片繁荣而上升
summary: South Korea’s bonds are set to extend this year’s rout as a semiconductor boom supercharges the nation’s economic growth and adds to inflationary pressures, analysts say.

title: Apple’s New ChatGPT-Like Siri App Will Have Auto-Deleting Chats
title_cn: 苹果新的类似 ChatGPT 的 Siri 应用程序将具有自动删除聊天功能
summary: Also: A Genmoji upgrade is coming in iOS 27.

title: China’s Energy Boom Could Give It the AI Edge
title_cn: 中国的能源繁荣可能赋予其人工智能优势
summary: As the United States and China compete for dominance in artificial intelligence, energy is emerging as a critical battleground. Former Treasury Secretary Hank Paulson warns that while the US still leads in AI technology, electricity shortages could become a major constraint as data center demand surges. Former US Ambassador to China Nicholas Burns says China’s enormous investments in transmission, renewables, batteries, and power generation are already reshaping global supply chains, while Hoover Institution senior fellow Elizabeth Economy argues Beijing’s clean-energy strategy is as much about economic and geopolitical power as climate policy. Together, their assessments point to a growing reality: the AI race may depend not just on chips and software, but on generating enough power to sustain the technology. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Samsung, Labor Union to Meet in ‘Last Chance’ to Avert Strike
title_cn: 三星与工会将召开避免罢工的“最后机会”
summary: Samsung Electronics Co. and its largest labor union are set to resume negotiations Monday to avert a strike that the nation’s prime minister warned could wreak havoc on the economy.

title: ASML Partners With Tata Electronics to Advance India Chip Plans
title_cn: ASML 与塔塔电子合作推进印度芯片计划
summary: ASML Holding NV entered into a partnership agreement with Tata Electronics Private Limited aimed at ramping up India’s goal to develop domestic chip-manufacturing capabilities.

title: AI Poised to Tilt Job Market Leverage Toward Older Workers
title_cn: 人工智能将使就业市场的影响力向老年工人倾斜
summary: When it comes to job cuts, older workers are often disproportionately affected. But a new survey of chief executive officers suggests this won’t be a given as companies adopt artificial intelligence.

title: ‘The Oppenheimer’ of the AI Era
title_cn: AI时代的“奥本海默”
summary: What drives the tech titans behind the AI arms race? For some, it's the thrill of scientific discovery; for others, it's the pursuit of profit.  Through the story of DeepMind co-founder Demis Hassabis and other AI leaders, author Sebastian Mallaby explores how motivations ranging from scientific curiosity to commercial ambition and political power are shaping the future of the technology. We sat down with Mallaby to discuss the fraught and simultaneously symbiotic tension between science and capital at the heart of the AI revolution, and whether governments are prepared for systems becoming dramatically more powerful. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Elon Musk Says He Isn’t Selling His SpaceX Shares as IPO Looms
title_cn: 埃隆·马斯克表示，随着 IPO 临近，他不会出售 SpaceX 股票
summary: Elon Musk said he is not selling any SpaceX shares, with the company reported to be preparing to file publicly for its long-awaited IPO as soon as next week.

title: Stopping Poor Financial Decisions: Masters in Business with Sheila Bair
title_cn: 停止糟糕的财务决策：希拉·贝尔 (Sheila Bair) 的商业硕士
summary: Barry sits down with Former FDIC Chair Sheila Bair. They discuss the release of her latest book "How Not To Lose A Million Dollars" and the importance of financial literacy across age groups. Bair also discusses her concerns about crypto and the rise of Buy Now, Pay Later. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stripe's John Collison on How Agentic Commerce Will Reshape the Internet | Odd Lots
title_cn: Stripe 的 John Collison 谈代理商务将如何重塑互联网零股
summary: The internet is made for shopping. For years, the main inputs for e-commerce transactions involved targeted ads, algorithmic recommendations, SEO, and lots of mindless scrolling. But agentic commerce might represent a sea change for e-commerce: With the rise of AI agents doing shopping on behalf of consumers, how are retailers going to adapt? John Collison, co-founder of the financial services and payment processing company Stripe, has first hand experience with all the ways e-commerce has changed in the last decade, and he thinks agentic commerce is going to completely transform the online shopping experience. We speak to Collison today about how AI has already changed the way consumers make purchasing decisions, why key word search is a "ridiculous" way to find things to buy, what it means when brands will have to appeal to AI agents as opposed to human buyers, and if AI agents can truly mimic human taste. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stripe's John Collison on How Agentic Commerce Will Reshape the Internet
title_cn: Stripe 的 John Collison 谈代理商务将如何重塑互联网
summary: Adapting to a world where AI agents are doing the shopping.

title: Odd Lots: Stripe’s John Collison on Agentic Commerce (Podcast)
title_cn: 奇怪的事情：Stripe 的 John Collison 谈代理商务（播客）
summary: The internet is made for shopping. For years, the main inputs for e-commerce transactions involved targeted ads, algorithmic recommendations, SEO, and lots of mindless scrolling. But agentic commerce might represent a sea change for e-commerce: With the rise of AI agents doing shopping on behalf of consumers, how are retailers going to adapt? John Collison, co-founder of the financial services and payment processing company Stripe, has first-hand experience with all the ways e-commerce has chang

title: Ackman Takes $2.1 Billion Microsoft Stake in Tech Bet
title_cn: 阿克曼在科技赌注中入股微软 21 亿美元
summary: Bill Ackman’s Pershing Square has built a $2.1 billion stake in Microsoft Corp., taking advantage of a decline in the company’s share price to invest in a business that he said is stronger and more resilient than investors think.

title: China Data Centers Tap Spot Power Trading First Time: Report
title_cn: 中国数据中心首次启动现货电力交易：报告
summary: China’s large-scale data centers have joined electricity spot trading as virtual power plants for the first time, marking a shift in how computing demand interacts with the grid, a report in an official media said.

title: Europe Lacks Everything Needed to Make Its Stock Market a Winner
title_cn: 欧洲缺乏使其股市成为赢家所需的一切
summary: The equity story that powered European stocks has unraveled as investors seek shelter from a global energy shock and buy into the artificial intelligence frenzy.

title: SpaceX Holders Sign Off on 5-for-1 Stock Split Ahead of IPO
title_cn: SpaceX 股东在 IPO 前签署 5 拆 1 的股票分割协议
summary: SpaceX notified investors that it is executing a 5-for-1 stock split, a move that will reduce the price investors will pay for each share offered in its impending initial public offering.

title: Snap, YouTube, TikTok Settle School Suit Targeting Social Media
title_cn: Snap、YouTube、TikTok 和解针对社交媒体的学校诉讼
summary: Snap Inc., Google’s YouTube and ByteDance Ltd.’s TikTok reached agreements to settle the first lawsuit headed to trial over claims that addiction to top social media platforms has disrupted learning and pushed public schools to spend massive sums fighting a mental health crisis, according to court filings.

title: Trump Discussed Nvidia Chips With Xi Jinping | Bloomberg Tech 5/15/2026
title_cn: 特朗普与习近平讨论英伟达芯片 |彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 15 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow break down the latest from Beijing after President Trump says he discussed Nvidia's H200 chips with Xi Jinping. Plus, they speak with the CEO of Figma after its earnings results defy fears that AI would disrupt the design stack. And, Caroline's conversation with OpenAI CFO Sarah Friar, who says the startup may raise more capital after completing its recent fundraising round. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Spanish Socialists Suffer Worst Loss Ever in Largest Region
title_cn: 西班牙社会主义者在最大地区遭受有史以来最严重的损失
summary: Spain’s governing Socialist party suffered its worst defeat ever in the country’s largest region, even as the conservative People’s Party also ceded ground.

title: Labour’s Starmer Revolt Revives Thorny Debate Over Rejoining EU
title_cn: 工党斯塔默起义再次引发有关重新加入欧盟的棘手争论
summary: The thorny question of whether Britain should unwind a decade of estrangement from the European Union is resurfacing as the Labour Party starts to imagine a future beyond Prime Minister Keir Starmer.

title: US, Iran Far From Hormuz Deal as Trump Says Clock Ticking
title_cn: 特朗普称时间紧迫，美国和伊朗距离霍尔木兹协议还很远
summary: The US and Iran remained far apart Sunday on a deal to end weeks of war and reopen the crucial Strait of Hormuz, as a drone attack sparked a fire at a United Arab Emirates nuclear plant, spotlighting the risks of a fragile ceasefire.

title: Polls Open Tuesday as Six States Vote on "Mini" Super Tuesday
title_cn: 投票周二开始，六个州在“迷你”超级星期二进行投票
summary: The Republican-led Congress, faced with deepening economic discontent exacerbated by President Donald Trump’s Iran war, is struggling to find consensus on any plan to address the cost of living with less than six months before midterm elections. Frustration is building among vulnerable GOP lawmakers and moderates who say the party is wasting valuable time on issues that aren’t resonating with Americans while ignoring the concerns about prices and inflation dominating the campaign trail. Bloomberg's Balance of Power's Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu hit the road to preview elections in Georgia. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fujimori, Sanchez Officially Declared Peru’s Runoff Candidates
title_cn: 藤森、桑切斯正式宣布秘鲁决选候选人
summary: Peruvian electoral authorities officially confirmed conservative Keiko Fujimori and left-wing lawmaker Roberto Sánchez as candidates for a presidential runoff election on June 7, more than a month after the first round was held.

title: France Says ‘No Taboo’ on Possible TotalEnergies Exceptional Tax
title_cn: 法国称对 TotalEnergies 可能征收的特殊税“没有禁忌”
summary: France won’t rule out an exceptional tax on TotalEnergies SE even though the government prefers sticking to a fuel-price cap for now, according to Budget Minister David Amiel.

title: Lai Says Taiwan Won’t Be Sacrificed as Trump Weighs Arms Deal
title_cn: 赖清德表示，特朗普考虑武器交易时，台湾不会被牺牲
summary: Taiwan’s President Lai Ching-te said the self-ruled democracy cannot be traded away, days after US President Donald Trump described a planned $14 billion arms sale to Taipei as a bargaining chip with China.

title: Trump Gets Revenge on Republican Who Voted to Convict Him
title_cn: 特朗普对投票定罪的共和党人进行报复
summary: President Donald Trump and Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. succeeded in their efforts to defeat Senator Bill Cassidy in Louisiana’s Republican primary, a signal of the enduring strength of the president’s hold on his party despite an unpopular war and soaring gas prices.

title: Record Drone Attack on Moscow Kills Three, Targets Refinery
title_cn: 莫斯科无人机袭击创纪录 造成三人死亡，目标是炼油厂
summary: Russia’s capital and the surrounding Moscow region came under record drone attacks overnight, leaving at least three people killed and over a dozen wounded.

title: Finance Chiefs to Consider World Order After Trump-Xi Reset
title_cn: 特朗普-习近平重置后，财政部长将考虑世界秩序
summary: The lopsided foundations of world growth will command the attention of global finance ministers this week in the aftermath of the summit that attempted to reset trade ties between the two biggest economies.

title: GOP Sen. Cassidy Loses Race in Win for Trump
title_cn: 共和党参议员卡西迪在竞选中输给特朗普
summary: Senator Bill Cassidy, a two-term Republican who voted to convict President Trump in his 2021 impeachment trial, could not muster enough votes to continue to a runoff next month. Bloomberg News Defense Reporter Jen Judson and New York Times White House Correspondent Luke Broadwater joined Christina Ruffini and David Gura this morning on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Swiss Lawmaker Pitches EU Immigration Tax in Overcrowding Debate
title_cn: 瑞士议员在过度拥挤的辩论中提出欧盟移民税
summary: A vice president of a Swiss government party wants to charge European Union immigrants a fee if their arrival causes population density stress in Switzerland, according to a newspaper report on Sunday.

title: Reeves Set to Abandon Planned Rise in Fuel Tax, The Sun Reports
title_cn: 据《太阳报》报道，里夫斯将放弃提高燃油税的计划
summary: UK Chancellor Rachel Reeves will this week scrap the government’s planned hike to fuel duty, the Sun reported, without saying where it got the information.

title: Malaysia’s Coalition Tensions Deepen as Anwar Floats Snap Poll
title_cn: 安瓦尔推翻民意调查，马来西亚联盟紧张局势加剧
summary: Fresh strains are emerging in Malaysia’s ruling alliance as political jockeying and oneupmanship among the coalition’s parties led Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim to raise the prospect of a snap general election if divisions deepen.

title: Streeting’s Rejoin-EU Push Risks Dividing Weakened Labour Party
title_cn: 斯特里廷重新加入欧盟可能会导致弱势工党分裂
summary: Wes Streeting used his first public appearance since resigning as UK health secretary last week to make his pitch for a potential leadership bid and called for Britain to rejoin the European Union.

title: Russia Eases Path to Citizenship for Moldova’s Transnistria
title_cn: 俄罗斯为摩尔多瓦德涅斯特河沿岸地区提供入籍便利
summary: President Vladimir Putin signed a decree aimed at simplifying the process for residents of Moldova’s pro-Moscow region of Transnistria to obtain Russian citizenship, drawing a sharp response from Ukraine.

title: Taxes and Trump Have Stymied Starmer’s Growth Revival Pledge
title_cn: 税收和特朗普阻碍了斯塔默的增长复兴承诺
summary: Weeks after his general election triumph, Keir Starmer sent voters a sobering message: “Things will get worse before we get better.”

title: Spain’s Most Populous Region Votes, Right Leads: What to Watch
title_cn: 西班牙人口最多的地区投票，右派领先：看点
summary: Andalusia, Spain’s most populous region, will hold elections Sunday with the People’s Party, which already governs the region, leading in polls to retain its majority.

title: Trump’s Ballroom Funding Hits Procedural Snag in US Senate
title_cn: 特朗普的宴会厅资金在美国参议院遇到程序障碍
summary: A Republican plan to earmark federal funding for President Donald Trump’s planned ballroom hit at least a temporary roadblock Saturday in the US Senate.

title: Latin American Nations Amp Up Their Concerns Over Bolivia Unrest
title_cn: 拉丁美洲国家加大对玻利维亚动乱的担忧
summary: Latin American nations are expressing growing concerns over shortages of crucial goods in Bolivia as unrest grips the country and poses a challenge to President Rodrigo Paz.

title: Venezuela Deports Saab as Government Steps Up US Cooperation
title_cn: 随着政府加强与美国的合作，委内瑞拉驱逐萨博
summary: Venezuela’s government said Alex Saab was deported from the country on Saturday over his alleged involvement in several crimes in the US.

title: Bolsonaro Tied With Lula in Largely Pre-Vorcaro Poll
title_cn: 博尔索纳罗在沃卡罗之前的民意调查中与卢拉并列
summary: Brazilian President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva and right-wing Senator Flavio Bolsonaro were tied in a hypothetical runoff, according to a Datafolha poll of voter preferences for the country’s election in October.

title: Colombia Presidential Candidate’s Local Campaign Head Is Killed
title_cn: 哥伦比亚总统候选人当地竞选负责人被杀
summary: The local campaign manager for Colombian presidential candidate Abelardo de la Espriella and one of his aides were shot and killed late Friday, stoking concerns of violence two weeks before the country’s elections.

title: Venezuela Circulates Draft of Oil Law Regulations for Companies
title_cn: 委内瑞拉分发公司石油法法规草案
summary: The Venezuelan government is circulating a draft of regulations as part of its newly enacted oil law, highly anticipated by companies planning to invest in the country’s increased oil production.

title: US, Iran Stall on Hormuz Reopening as Oil Supplies Tighten
title_cn: 由于石油供应紧张，美国和伊朗暂停霍尔木兹海峡重新开放
summary: Iran said transit through the critical Strait of Hormuz will flow once the conflict with the US and Israel is over, but the sides are no closer to resolving their differences or finding a path to achieve it.

title: US Allows Russia Oil Sales Waiver to Expire Despite Tight Market
title_cn: 尽管市场紧张，美国仍允许俄罗斯石油销售豁免到期
summary: The Trump administration allowed a waiver that encouraged more Russian crude sales to lapse, even as the Iran war stokes concerns about global oil supplies and higher fuel costs.
